positive: A central, minimalist composition featuring a stylized crescent moon surrounded by delicate, luminous bioluminescent flora and constellations. The style should be intricate line art combined with ethereal digital painting, reminiscent of Alphonse Mucha meets modern scientific illustration. Focus on strong silhouettes and highly saturated, contrasting colors: deep indigo and midnight blue background contrasting with glowing emerald, soft gold, and pearlescent white accents. The composition must be perfectly symmetrical and suitable for placement on fabric, ensuring clean edges, no complex gradients that might bleed, and a high level of visual contrast for textile printing. Vector art quality, celestial magic, cosmic flora, intricate details.
negative: blurry, low detail, messy, amateur, text, signature, logo, watermark, artifact, noisy, grain, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn, writing, photorealism, low contrast
